'''Veratil''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[t'landa Til]] priest who, with [[Teroenza]], took part in the [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]] operation masterminded by the [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] clan during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
When [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] first came to Ylesia, Veratil provided him a tour of their facilities. Veratil was occasionally given the task of delivering the [[Exultation]] at "religious revivals" around the galaxy with the intent to trick religious pilgrims into going to Ylesia, where they would unwittingly become [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]]. At one such appearance he spotted Solo, who had previously destroyed a [[Spice/Legends|spice]] factory. With this information, he went straight to [[Teroenza]], who imediatly ordered a bounty on young Solo. Veratil was killed during the Ylesian liberation when agents of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] assassinated all the priests in preparation for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] invasion known as the [[Battle of Ylesia]]. Armed mercenaries burst from the cover of the forests while Veratil was taking a mudbath and fired on him and his fellow t'landa Til. He died from a blaster shot to the eye.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]''
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]''
